Reason: Tech Reviewed (G) Suboptimal centering and FOV
Comments:
Thank you for bringing your concerns to my attention. I have had a formal one-on-one discussion with the technologist to clearly outline expectations for image quality moving forward. During that meeting, I emphasized the importance of consistent
positioning, appropriate technique, and the need for all images to meet diagnostic standards.
To support improvement and provide accountability, I will be conducting monthly image quality reviews with this technologist. These reviews will continue until she demonstrates consistent improvement and is no longer appearing on the Tech QA list. Duringthis period, I will also monitor feedback from radiologists and provide coaching or re-education as needed.
Please don't hesitate to continue sharing feedback with me. My goal is to ensure we are delivering the highest standard of imaging for both our patients and providers.
-Colin
